parameters.content:
## Global Error Handler → AgeniusDesk

Catches errors from ALL workflows and sends them to your AgeniusDesk instance.

**Setup:**
1. Set the `AGENIUSDESK_URL` environment variable in your n8n instance
   (e.g., `http://your-dashboard:3000`)
2. Or edit the HTTP Request node URL directly
3. Go to n8n Settings → Workflows → Error Workflow → Select this workflow
